name: SSL/TLS Misconfiguration (Weak Ciphers and Protocols)
description: Detects SSL/TLS misconfigurations including support for deprecated protocols (SSLv3, TLS 1.0, TLS 1.1), weak cipher suites (RC4, DES, 3DES, NULL, EXPORT), missing HSTS headers, and certificate issues.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Disable SSLv3, TLS 1.0, and TLS 1.1. Use only TLS 1.2+ with strong cipher suites (AES-GCM, ChaCha20). Enable HSTS with a minimum max-age of 31536000 (1 year). Use certificates from trusted CAs with proper chain validation.
